assertions.text: Identifies all three methods have silent failure patterns (try? in loadOrders, try? in placeOrder, unhandled throw in deleteOrder)
assertions.rationale: Comprehensive audit requires finding all three — skill trains systematic scanning

assertions.text: Identifies that placeOrder's two try? calls create a logic error (confirmation email sent even if order submission fails)
assertions.rationale: Skill teaches that try? hides control flow bugs, not just diagnostic loss

assertions.text: Identifies print('Order placed successfully') is invisible in production (not part of unified logging system)
assertions.rationale: Skill rule: print() is not error handling, not visible on production devices

assertions.text: Identifies Task.detached strips priority and cancellation propagation (rarely correct choice)
assertions.rationale: Skill cross-references with swift-concurrency knowledge about detached tasks

assertions.text: Provides fix with os.Logger using privacy annotations (not just print or generic logging)
assertions.rationale: Skill mandates privacy-annotated Logger — the key differentiator from baseline

assertions.text: Adds ErrorReporter.recordNonFatal() or crash SDK call in every catch block
assertions.rationale: Remote reporting in every error path — the core skill requirement
